title: Vnaruka 11218
body:

remove leading whitespace from that line:

> /kind deprecation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
Backport the changes for GHSA-5vpc-35f4-r8w6 to the 1.29 branch.

#### How to verify it

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
Fixes RHEL-67614 RHEL-67608

<!--
Automatically closes linked issue when PR is merged.
Uncomment the following comment block and include the issue
number or None on one line.
Usage: `Fixes #<issue number>`, or `Fixes (paste link of issue)`, or `None`.
-->

<!--
Fixes #
or
None
-->

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

Addresses CVE-2024-11218 for buildah 1.29

If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note

comments.body: @vnaruka looks like you need to define "TeeType" somewhere in the define section.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat*, *vnaruka* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.29/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Proceeding with Another PR for fixing CVE-2024-11218 (https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5955)
